mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_item, rorder_fno, type_code, o_modelNo, o_quantity, o_price, o_dlvDate, n_modelNo, n_quantity, n_price, n_dlvDate, remark, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, duty_name
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_order_modidata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_order_modidata (id, order_id, order_item, rorder_fno, type_code, o_modelNo, o_quantity, o_price, o_dlvDate, n_modelNo, n_quantity, n_price, n_dlvDate, remark, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, duty_name) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{nModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dutyName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

update dbo.ops_order_modidata
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_fno = #{record.rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type_code = #{record.typeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
o_modelNo = #{record.oModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

o_price = #{record.oPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
o_dlvDate = #{record.oDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
n_modelNo = #{record.nModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
n_quantity = #{record.nQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
n_price = #{record.nPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
n_dlvDate = #{record.nDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duty_name = #{record.dutyName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_fno = #{rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

o_modelNo = #{oModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

o_price = #{oPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
o_dlvDate = #{oDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

n_quantity = #{nQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
n_price = #{nPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
n_dlvDate = #{nDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duty_name = #{dutyName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
